name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES state

TypeOK == state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]

Init == state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

Next ==
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ state[i] = "idle"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ state[i] = "trying"
       /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => state[j] # "critical"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
       /\ state[i] = "critical"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]
  \/ state' = state

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N
ASSUME N \in 1..10

VARIABLES state, vote, decision, log

TypeOK == /\ state \in {"init", "prepare", "commit", "abort"}
          /\ vote \in 0..N
          /\ decision \in {"commit", "abort", "none"}
          /\ log \in {"commit", "abort", "none"}

Init == /\ state = "init"
        /\ vote = 0
        /\ decision = "none"
        /\ log = "none"

Prepare == /\ state = "init"
           /\ state' = "prepare"
           /\ UNCHANGED <<vote, decision, log>>

VoteYes == /\ state = "prepare"
           /\ vote' = vote + 1
           /\ state' = "prepare"
           /\ UNCHANGED <<decision, log>>

VoteNo == /\ state = "prepare"
          /\ decision' = "abort"
          /\ state' = "abort"
          /\ UNCHANGED <<vote, log>>

Commit == /\ state = "prepare"
          /\ vote = N
          /\ decision' = "commit"
          /\ state' = "commit"
          /\ log' = "commit"

Abort == /\ state = "prepare"
         /\ decision' = "abort"
         /\ state' = "abort"
         /\ log' = "abort"

Next == Prepare
        \/ VoteYes
        \/ VoteNo
        \/ Commit
        \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, vote, decision, log>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

TypeOK == forks \in [1..N -> 1..N] /\ state \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

Init == forks = [i \in 1..N |-> i] /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == 
    \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ state[i] = "thinking"
        /\ forks[i] = i
        /\ forks[If(i = N, 1, i + 1)] = If(i = N, 1, i + 1)
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
    \/ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ state[i] = "hungry"
        /\ forks[i] = i
        /\ forks[If(i = N, 1, i + 1)] = If(i = N, 1, i + 1)
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![If(i = N, 1, i + 1)] = i]
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
    \/ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ state[i] = "eating"
        /\ forks[i] = i
        /\ forks[If(i = N, 1, i + 1)] = i
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![If(i = N, 1, i + 1)] = If(i = N, 1, i + 1)]
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> 0..N]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          \/ /\ flag[i] = FALSE
              /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
              /\ UNCHANGED num
          \/ /\ flag[i] = TRUE
              /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = Max(Seq(~num)) + 1]
              /\ UNCHANGED flag
          \/ /\ flag[i] = TRUE
              /\ num[i] > 0
              /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = num[i]]
              /\ UNCHANGED flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

TypeOK == 
    /\ q \in Seq(0..K)
    /\ head \in 0..K
    /\ tail \in 0..K
    /\ size \in 0..K

Init == 
    /\ q = <<>>
    /\ head = 0
    /\ tail = 0
    /\ size = 0

Producer == 
    /\ size < K
    /\ q' = Append(q, 1)  \* Enqueue 1
    /\ tail' = (tail + 1) \mod (K + 1)
    /\ size' = size + 1
    /\ head' = head

Consumer == 
    /\ size > 0
    /\ q' = Tail(q)  \* Dequeue
    /\ head' = (head + 1) \mod (K + 1)
    /\ size' = size - 1
    /\ tail' = tail

Next == 
    \/ Producer
    \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in 0..N
          /\ votedFor \in 0..N
          /\ state \in {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = 0
        /\ state = "Follower"

RequestVote == /\ state = "Candidate"
              /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
              /\ votedFor' = 1
              /\ state' = "Leader"

Next == \/ RequestVote
        \/ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

TypeOK == readers \in 0..N /\ writer_active \in {TRUE, FALSE}

Init == readers = 0 /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next ==
  \/ /\ readers' = readers + 1
     /\ writer_active' = writer_active
     /\ readers <= N - 1
  \/ /\ readers' = readers - 1
     /\ writer_active' = writer_active
     /\ readers >= 1
  \/ /\ readers' = readers
     /\ writer_active' = TRUE
     /\ readers = 0
  \/ /\ readers' = readers
     /\ writer_active' = FALSE
     /\ writer_active = TRUE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamport ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N
ASSUME N \in 1..10

VARIABLES state, channel, marker

(* Type constraints *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"active", "recorded"}]
          /\ channel \in [1..N -> [1..N -> {"empty", "msg"}]]
          /\ marker \in [1..N -> [1..N -> BOOLEAN]]

(* Initial state: all processes active, channels empty, no markers *)
Init == /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "active"]
        /\ channel = [i \in 1..N |-> [j \in 1..N |-> "empty"]]
        /\ marker = [i \in 1..N |-> [j \in 1..N |-> FALSE]]

(* Process i records its state and sends markers on all outgoing channels *)
Record(i) == /\ state[i] = "recorded"
             /\ \A j \in 1..N : marker[i][j] = TRUE

(* Sending a marker on channel i->j *)
SendMarker(i, j) == /\ channel[i][j] = "empty"
                   /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![i][j] = "msg"]
                   /\ marker' = [marker EXCEPT ![i][j] = FALSE]
                   /\ UNCHANGED <<state>>

(* Receiving a marker on channel j->i *)
ReceiveMarker(j, i) == /\ channel[j][i] = "msg"
                      /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![j][i] = "empty"]
                      /\ marker' = [marker EXCEPT ![j][i] = FALSE]
                      /\ UNCHANGED <<state>>

(* Sending a normal message on channel i->j *)
SendMsg(i, j) == /\ channel[i][j] = "empty"
                 /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![i][j] = "msg"]
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<state, marker>>

(* Receiving a normal message on channel j->i *)
ReceiveMsg(j, i) == /\ channel[j][i] = "msg"
                   /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![j][i] = "empty"]
                   /\ UNCHANGED <<state, marker>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          \E j \in 1..N :
            (state[i] = "active" /\ Record(i) /\ SendMarker(i, j))
            \/ (marker[j][i] /\ ReceiveMarker(j, i))
            \/ (SendMsg(i, j))
            \/ (ReceiveMsg(j, i))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channel, marker>>

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES token, state

TypeOK == /\ token \in 1..N
          /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "active"}]

Init == /\ token = 1
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

Next == 
    /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED state

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, state>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

KeysVal == 1..Keys
ValuesVal == 1..Values

VARIABLES store

TypeOK == store \in [KeysVal -> ValuesVal]

Init == store = [k \in KeysVal |-> 1]

Next == \E k \in KeysVal : \E v \in ValuesVal :
          store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_store

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS N, M

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen, ballot, value

TypeOK == /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> [ballot: Nat, value: Nat]]
          /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [ballot: Nat, value: Nat]]
          /\ chosen \in Nat

Init == /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> 0]]
        /\ proposers = [j \in 1..M |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> 0]]
        /\ chosen = 0

Prepare(p) == /\ proposers[p].ballot' = proposers[p].ballot + 1
              /\ UNCHANGED <<proposers, chosen>>

Promise(a, p) == /\ acceptors[a].ballot' = proposers[p].ballot
                /\ UNCHANGED <<proposers, chosen>>

Accept(a, p) == /\ acceptors[a].value' = proposers[p].value
               /\ UNCHANGED <<proposers, chosen>>

Accepted(a, p) == /\ acceptors[a].ballot' = proposers[p].ballot
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<proposers, chosen>>

Choose(p) == /\ chosen' = proposers[p].value
            /\ UNCHANGED <<acceptors, proposers>>

Next == \/ \E p \in 1..M: Prepare(p)
        \/ \E a \in 1..N : \E p \in 1..M : Promise(a, p)
        \/ \E a \in 1..N : \E p \in 1..M : Accept(a, p)
        \/ \E a \in 1..N : \E p \in 1..M : Accepted(a, p)
        \/ \E p \in 1..M: Choose(p)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, MAX_RETRIES

VARIABLES seq, ack, retries, state

TypeOK == /\ seq \in 0..N
          /\ ack \in 0..N
          /\ retries \in 0..MAX_RETRIES
          /\ state \in {"idle", "sending", "waiting_ack", "done", "failed"}

Init == /\ seq = 0
        /\ ack = 0
        /\ retries = 0
        /\ state = "idle"

SendChunk == /\ state = "idle"
             /\ seq < N
             /\ state' = "sending"

Transmit == /\ state = "sending"
            /\ state' = "waiting_ack"

AckReceived == /\ state = "waiting_ack"
               /\ ack = seq
               /\ state' = "idle"
               /\ seq' = seq + 1
               /\ retries' = 0

AckLost == /\ state = "waiting_ack"
           /\ ack # seq
           /\ state' = "waiting_ack"
           /\ retries' = retries + 1
           /\ retries' <= MAX_RETRIES

GiveUp == /\ state = "waiting_ack"
          /\ retries = MAX_RETRIES
          /\ state' = "failed"

Done == /\ seq = N
        /\ state' = "done"

Next == \E s \in {"idle", "sending", "waiting_ack", "done", "failed"}:
          /\ state' = s
          /\ UNCHANGED <<seq, ack, retries>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<seq, ack, retries, state>>
